category_a.name: Execution_Timeout_Termination
category_a.definition: The session is killed by an externally imposed limit before the task reaches a stopping point or artifacts are finalized.

category_b.name: Solver_Incorrect_Or_Incomplete_Patch_Logic
category_b.definition: The agent applies a change that does not correctly address the root cause or covers only part of the required behavior.

domain.name: Software Engineering / Code Repair
domain.task_complexity: Repository-scale debugging with hidden behavioral constraints
